---
title: "Blog Index"
listing:
    contents: posts/**/*.qmd
    date-format: dddd MMMM-DD-YYYY
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    categories: numbered
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [date, title, reading-time, description, categories]
    feed: true

page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

---
